response:
I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription, specializing in various medical specialties. I possess strong knowledge of medical terminology and have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I have excellent interpersonal skills, a strong team spirit, and a willingness to learn and develop new competencies. I am reliable, dependable, and consistently seek new responsibilities across diverse employment areas. I excel in supervising, transcription, and customer relationship management, often exceeding productivity to contribute to organizational success.  

I have experience as a medical scribe and editor, working with platforms such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office. I have demonstrated strong editing skills, maintaining quality and adherence to turnaround time. I have also held roles as a supervisor and customer relationship executive, overseeing a team of 10 individuals, managing workflows, and ensuring high-quality glass production. I have served as a quality analyst and controller, implementing improvements and evaluating performance.  

My skills include proficiency in Word, Excel, Outlook, electronic health records, and email, with a typing speed of 70-80 words per minute. I am passionate about my work, adaptable, and committed to delivering exceptional service. I am an enthusiastic professional with a strong background in medical transcription and a desire to contribute to a successful organization.  

I am an Indian national with an On Visit Visa and am eager to contribute my skills and experience to your team. I am available for a professional medical scribe or transcription role.
